communityRoot.title: Explore the Adon ERP community
communityRoot.description: Find practical learning resources, implementation support, collaboration spaces, and software access points from one place.
highlights: Start with guided tutorials, documentation, and training paths.
Connect with partners, advisors, and support channels when you need execution help.
Join forum, GitHub, event, and translation spaces to contribute back to the ecosystem.

collaborate.title: Work with the Adon ERP community
collaborate.description: Join the collaboration layer of the ecosystem to contribute code, share ideas, attend events, and help the platform reach more teams.
highlights: Use GitHub for code, issues, and contribution workflows.
Use the forum to exchange product and implementation knowledge.
Use events and translations to extend reach beyond code.

learn.description: Choose the right learning format for your team, whether you need quick tutorials, deep documentation, scheduled training, or ongoing content.
highlights: Start with tutorials for guided product workflows.
Use documentation when you need structured reference material.
Layer training, certifications, blog posts, and podcast content as your team matures.

learnPodcast.title: Listen to Adon ERP conversations
learnPodcast.description: Follow product thinking, operations stories, and ecosystem updates in audio format while your team stays close to the platform roadmap.

Pair podcast listening with blog posts and tutorials for deeper context.

getServices.title: Choose the right support path
getServices.description: Move from product evaluation to execution with partner, advisory, implementation, support, and upgrade help from the Adon ERP ecosystem.
highlights: Use partners for implementation, customization, and delivery capacity.
Use advisors to shape rollout decisions before committing to execution.
Use support, upgrades, and accounting services to reduce operational friction.

Use partners or advisors when internal teams need extra migration capacity.

Pair the decision with release awareness before starting rollout.
